title: Demo: Acme Code Generator (GUI) — Windows
summary: Minimal GUI demo. The agent opens a single-screen web app (input\app.html) in Chrome, types the Order ID from input/order.json, clicks Generate Code, reads the in-browser confirmation code and writes it to output\result.txt. Exercises the input/software/reference/output surface and the desktop GUI bridge in a few steps. Windows counterpart of demo/hello; identical except OS conventions.
